description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled van with a blue upper body and a custom wrap featuring large, bold white text and a scenic cityscape image on the sides. The van has a boxy shape with rounded edges, a high roof, and black bumpers. Both the side and rear doors are open, revealing a green and brown interior with visible seats and cargo space. The front features a wide windshield with two wipers, rectangular headlights, and a black grille. The wheels are small and black, and the van has a license plate on the rear. The overall design suggests it is used for business promotion or mobile services, as indicated by the advertising graphics.
description: A blue, retro-style van with custom advertising graphics, open side and rear doors, and a visible green-brown interior. The van features a high roof, black bumpers, and compact wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full advertising wrap, closed front door, and open rear door with a glimpse of the green interior.
description_view_1: Rear view with both rear doors open, revealing the cargo area and a visible license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the sliding side door open, exposing the green seats and interior details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide windshield, two wipers, black grille, and one open front door.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
